visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair and a white/black striped sweater talks to a person wearing a large orange cartoon mask and a red hoodie. They are in a brightly lit room with a brown leather couch and shelves filled with colorful toys and figurines in the background. (2) The camera focus shifts to the man in the striped sweater, who displays exaggerated facial expressions of excitement and shock. He uses animated hand gestures while looking directly into the lens. The background features a domestic-style studio with soft overhead lighting and decorative items. (3) Various women, dressed in casual sweaters and skirts, approach a large cardboard box labeled with text. They reach out to open the box lid. The setting is a large, open indoor studio with white walls and studio lighting equipment visible in the far corners. (4) Fast cuts show the man's head popping out of the box unexpectedly as the lids are lifted. The victims jump back with wide eyes and open mouths, their hands flying up in surprise. Large colorful text overlays with jagged borders appear frequently on the screen. (5) The filming perspective shifts to inside the box, looking up as a woman opens it. Her face fills the frame, showing a transition from curious expectation to sudden fright, then quickly to a wide smile and laughter. The lighting remains consistent and bright.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 年終獎金企劃. (2) [Subtitle]: 看啊. 感動啊. 謝謝老闆啊. 沒有啊. 搞他們啊. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們坐在一個箱子裡面. 然後假裝跟他説. (4) [Subtitle]: 啊今年我們的金額. 已經寫在裏面. 打開來. (5) [Logo]: 嘎5歲在這裡. (6) [Slogan]: 開我. (7) [Variety]: 楊亞妮 嚇到!!! (8) [Variety]: 王鴨鴨 嚇到!!! (9) [Variety]: 不負眾望. 洪+0 嚇到!!! (10) [Variety]: 亞瑟 嚇到!!! (11) [Variety]: !!!!!!!!!!! (12) [Variety]: 劉珊佑 嚇到!!! (13) [Subtitle]: 我直接被摸頭殺. (14) [Variety]: (想當縛嘉 留言+1).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main prankster male, 5 female victims, 2 background staff/observers
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young adult male with dyed brown hair, wearing a white and black horizontal striped sweater by Lacoste and dark pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio set designed like a living room with toy figurines on shelves, a leather couch, white pillows, clothing racks, and professional softbox lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high pitch variability and a friendly, energetic tone. Fast-tempo electronic background music begins with a clear major mode. (2) Sound of clapping and high-pitched laughter punctuates the energetic dialogue. A sudden hard cut in audio as the tone briefly shifts to a theatrical whisper. (3) A high-intensity vocal scream occurs, immediately followed by a cartoon-style 'boing' impact sound effect and high-arousal female laughter. (4) Rhythmic sounds of cardboard boxes being manipulated followed by repetitive cycles of vocal scares and laughing voices. The background music remains playful and constant. (5) Continuous female screams mixed with loud collective laughter and comic meme-style sound effects that mirror the visual scene cuts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Prank Setup -> Series of Reactions -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a humorous jump-scare prank compilation. The creator hides in boxes and scares staff members who think they are opening their end-of-year bonus boxes, capturing their genuine expressions of fright and subsequent laughter.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy comedic content featuring fast-paced editing and vibrant on-screen reactions characteristic of viral social media pranks.
